tables.title: JumpSTART Pediatric MCI Triage Categories
rows: Able to walk (use judgment for infants/toddlers not yet walking at baseline)
Apneic but breathing resumes with airway repositioning or 5 rescue breaths; abnormal respiratory rate for age; abnormal perfusion or AVPU with normal respiratory rate
Normal respiratory rate for age, normal perfusion, and normal AVPU
Apneic with no pulse; or apneic with pulse that does not resume breathing after 5 rescue breaths

tables.title: JumpSTART vs Adult START — Key Differences
rows: Reposition airway once; if still apneic, expectant
Reposition airway; if still apneic, give 5 rescue breaths before expectant
Reflects that pediatric arrest is often respiratory in origin and potentially reversible
